title: Jejak Tak Terlihat di Bilik Mesin
theme: Menyelidiki serangkaian peristiwa kecil yang meresahkan di tempat umum, mendorong refleksi mendalam tentang paranoia dan realitas yang ambigu.

cover.prompt: Interior of a modern self-service laundromat, clean and well-lit. The primary focus is on a single front-loading washing machine, positioned in a gently tucked-away corner. Gentle, warm lighting bathes this specific machine, setting it apart from its surroundings. A subtle visual peculiarity or distinctive feature around this machine, hinting at an unusual attraction. The rest of the laundromat interior, with other machines and a clean pathway, is slightly out of focus in the background. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, inviting atmosphere.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A freelancer named Risa increasingly notices bizarre, fleeting anomalies on her favorite washing machine at a self-service laundry, from altered numbers and strange symbols to a misplaced pebble and a cryptic message. This escalating series of small, unsettling events leads her to question her perception of reality. She conducts an experiment by leaving a hidden mark, which culminates in her witnessing a peculiar, ritualistic interaction between another customer and the machine, deepening the mystery. The story concludes without clear answers, leaving Risa with a profound sense of introspection about the fluid nature of reality and how the mind constructs narratives from ambiguous details.
meta.target_emotion: Intrigue, subtle unease, introspection, wonder about reality
